cards.desc:
🚨giveaway alert!🚨

‌

With festival season heading into full swing, one of the most important festival items to have in your arsenal is earplugs!

⁠

Our friends at Zound are testing a new set of designed earplugs and we are going to give one of them away for free!🎉 - The unreleased Golden Radiance pair 

⁠

🌟Entry Rules:⁠

🎄  Follow us[ ](https://www.instagram.com/eargasmearplugs/ "‌")\@bnbhurtspodcast

🎄  Like this post

🎄  Bonus entry sharing this post to your story 

🎄  Comment a festival your looking forward to (one that you will wear these earplug to xD)

‌

⁠

The winner will be chosen and announced at 5:00 pm PST TODAY! Good Luck!⁠

⁠

Zound is currently having a 40% flash sale that won’t last long! For an additional 10% enter our code - **bnbhurts10** for an ADDITONAL 10% OFF!

‌

\*Participants must be based in Canada.
cards.name: Earplug Giveaway

🚨giveaway alert!🚨
 
Do you and a friend want to feel ‘Forever Meloncholia’ with I Hate Models?👀😷👀

🌟We’re giving away a pair of tickets to the Toronto warehouse show on November 9th!🌟
⁠
How To Enter ⬇️:⁠
 
☑️ Follow us @‌bnbhurtspodcast
 
☑️ Like this post
 
☑️ Tag a friend who you would bring in the comment below (multiple entries allowed – both of you must be following @‌bnbhurtspodcast)
 
☑️ Share this post to your story and don't forget to tag us!
⁠
The winner will be chosen and announced Thursday November 7th 7:00 pm Good Luck!⁠ 🪩🪩
*Participants must be based in Canada.
